heading: Applicability ofsection 8301 of title 5
label: 1404 Applicability ofsection 8301 of title 5
text: The retirement provisions of this title are subject to .section 8301 of title 5
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1404[No source].[No source].The effect of the act of (), in temporarily deferring retirement dates otherwise specifically fixed by law is reflected in the sections of the proposed text that name those dates. This section is inserted to make clear that under that act such deferments have no effect on the applicability of the specific rates that are to be used in computing retired pay.April 23, 19305 U.S.C. 47a
Amendments1966— substituted “8301” for “47a” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 89–718
amendments: Amendments1966— substituted “8301” for “47a” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 89–718
